title: Mornington Gardens Holiday Village
description: Simple wood cabins with kitchenettes in a relaxed resort offering a playground, BBQs & a game room.
hotelDescription:
On a sprawling property off the Nepean Highway, this relaxed resort is a minute's walk from heritage train rides at Tanti Park station and 4 km from Mothers Beach.
 The simply furnished wood cabins feature decks, sitting areas and kitchenettes, plus flat-screen TVs, fans and air-conditioning; some have bunk beds and/or sleep up to 6 people.
 Amenities include a library, a playground and a BBQ area, as well as a game room with table tennis and a pool table. Parking is available. A campground is on-site.
